title: mentha × schultziana var. carniolica
intro: Mentha × schultziana var. carniolica, also known as Cornish mint or carniolica mint, is a natural hybrid of the peppermint plant (Mentha × schultziana) and is characterized by its unique characteristics and properties. This plant possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone, which have been used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × schultziana var. carniolica include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce stress and anxiety, and even aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various health issues.
